full_text:
Lady Liu 劉夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Liu (劉夫人). Yuan Shao’s wife. Mother of Yuan Shang. Lady Liu was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
